errors.description: Required evidence record chain is missing or invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until evidence record continuity is proven

errors.description: Target hash algorithm is not allowed for PQ renewal planning.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until target hash algorithm is governed

errors.description: Target signature family is not allowed for PQ renewal planning.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until signature family transition is governed

errors.description: PQ renewal plan attempts a hash downgrade or non-upgrade.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning on downgrade

errors.description: PQ renewal plan append-only position or replay binding is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until append-only continuity is proven

errors.description: A previously observed PQ renewal plan was reused.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning on replayed plan records

errors.description: PQ renewal validation policy or migration reason is invalid.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until policy authority is explicit

errors.description: PQ renewal diagnostics contain unsafe or sensitive material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny PQ renewal planning until diagnostics are redacted and audit-safe
